latest.reason: Verified that the existing `SimpleBondV4` invariant coverage already lives in the full `test/SimpleBondV4.test.js` suite and still passes unchanged. `npx hardhat test test/SimpleBondV4.test.js` passed with 126 tests, and a follow-up `npx hardhat test` run passed with 256 tests, so the targeted verification did not hide a broader regression.
